methods.description: This method involves analyzing the germination percentage of pollen grains using a completely randomized block design (CRBD) and analysis of variance (ANOVA) to determine statistical differences between species and sampling regions.

steps.description: A total of 18 male inflorescences from each species and hybrid were isolated to collect pollen in Site 1, and 25 male inflorescences from each species and hybrid were isolated in Site 2 for comparison.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate and collect pollen from male inflorescences at two sites

steps.description: A completely randomised block design (CRBD) was applied and an analysis of variance with 95% of reliability was performed.
steps.searchable_summary: apply CRBD and perform ANOVA with 95% reliability

steps.description: Tukey's test (5%) was performed where appropriate when statistical differences were presented in the Analysis of Variance.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Tukey's test at 5% significance level

methods.description: This method compares the fruit set using a randomized complete block design (RCBD) in a factorial arrangement to analyze the effects of different pollen donors on female flowers across two sites.

steps.description: A total of 5 male inflorescences from each species were isolated to collect pollen from Site 1 and Site 2 to use as pollen donors for female flowers from oil palm species and hybrids.
steps.searchable_summary: collect pollen from male inflorescences at two sites for use as pollen donors

steps.description: Three female inflorescences in the anthesis of each oil palm species, present in each site (1 and 2), were used as pollen receptors.
steps.searchable_summary: select female inflorescences in anthesis as pollen receptors

steps.description: A randomised complete block design (RCBD) in factorial arrangement 3x4 (female flowers and pollen donors) was carried out on each site and later an analysis of variance (ANOVA) with 95% reliability was performed.
steps.searchable_summary: apply RCBD in 3x4 factorial arrangement and perform ANOVA with 95% reliability

steps.description: If the ANOVA (p<0.05) presented statistical differences, Tukey's test (p<0.05%) was performed to determine groups of similar behaviour.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Tukey's test at 5% significance level if ANOVA shows differences
